name: GG Wellness Center, Nebraska City
description: GG Wellness Center, Nebraska City is a place to play pickleball in Nebraska City, NE. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, and water.
fees: Fee required — Members play for free. Non-members can purchase a Day Pass for $10.75. $5.00 for seniors.

name: Steinhart Park Pickleball Courts, Nebraska City
description: Steinhart Park Pickleball Courts, Nebraska City is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Nebraska City, NE. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water.
